title: Indexing Basics Quiz
description: Test your basic knowledge of database indexing.

questions.question: What is the primary role of a database index?
options: To speed up data retrieval by avoiding full table scans

questions.question: An index can be compared to what part of a textbook?

What type of index is created automatically on the primary key column?
